features: ✅ Rich Oud Fragrance: Indulge in a touch of luxury with our deep, woody Oud-scented disposable towel wipes, offering an elegant aroma ideal for special occasions or everyday refreshment.
✅ 6 Individually Wrapped Disposable Towels: Each box includes 6 hygienically sealed towels (25cm x 25cm)—perfect for maintaining freshness and cleanliness on the go.
✅ Hot or Cold Use Anytime: Use warm for a comforting spa-like feel or chilled for a cooling refresh—ideal after meals, during travel, or outdoor activities.
✅ Gentle on Skin, Soft in Feel: Crafted from premium, skin-friendly material, each towel is soft, non-irritating, and suitable for hands, face, and body.
✅ Travel-Friendly & Multi Use: Compact and portable, these towels are ideal for hotels, restaurants, camping, festivals, takeaways, or keeping in your bag or car for instant luxury.
description: Product Description Elevate your refreshment experience with G4GADGET Luxury Disposable Refreshing Towel Wipes (6 Pack), beautifully infused with the opulent and exotic scent of Oud. Known for its rich and captivating aroma, Oud adds a touch of indulgence to your daily routine or special gatherings. Each pack contains 6 individually wrapped towels, sized at 25cm x 25cm, designed for single use to ensure maximum hygiene and freshness. Whether you're traveling, camping, dining out, or entertaining guests, these premium-quality disposable towels offer both convenience and luxury. Enjoy them hot or cold—microwave for a warm, soothing feel or chill for a cool, revitalizing sensation. The soft, skin-friendly material makes them suitable for face, hands, and body, providing a gentle cleanse with every use. Perfect for restaurants, hotels, takeaways, festivals, or simply keeping in your car or bag, G4GADGET Oud Refreshing Towel Wipes are your go-to solution for elegant, portable cleanliness. Safety Warning Avoid contact with eyes. Discontinue use if skin irritation occurs. Dispose of used wipes properly; do not flush.
